refresh.Chinese:
用法：refresh
功能：重新构建工具索引缓存，更新命令映射表
场景：新增/删除工具后执行，确保工具可被识别
适配系统：Windows/Linux/Termux全兼容
refresh.English:
Usage: refresh
Function: Rebuild tool index cache and update command mapping
Scenario: Run after adding/deleting tools to ensure recognition
Compatible systems: Windows/Linux/Termux
